abi.note: Full ABI available on the verified Polygonscan page; not bundled here because legacy source is not in this repo.

notes: Pre-hardened bytecode. Live since project inception, used by every Munity Club on Polygon PoS. The hardened vNext source in this repo's contracts/munity.sol shares the public buy(uint256,uint256) shape but is not byte-for-byte identical — see deployments/README.md for the source-vs-deployment note.
